title: Crispy Chicken Kebabs
description: Crispy and flavorful kebabs made with marinated chicken, perfect for a quick Chinese-inspired meal.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together kebab sauce, cornstarch, and grated ginger. Add the chicken and mix until coated.
2. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
3. Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan or a deep fryer to 350°F.
4. Remove the chicken from the marinade and coat with dry breadcrumbs. Fry the chicken in batches until golden brown, about 5-7 minutes.
5. Drain the fried chicken on paper towels and serve hot garnished with chopped scallions.
